external_references.notes: Identifiers only. Authentication must be supplied at runtime via environment variables; never embed secrets in this manifest.

cross_repo_ingestion.hint: Run 'python scripts/total_fleet_crawler.py' on a workstation with GH_TOKEN (or GITHUB_TOKEN) set to populate fleet/fleet_discovery.json. The build script will then merge its output into 'fleet_map' on the next run.

out_of_scope: live network calls to Google Drive or Hugging Face
addition of CCXT or other trading dependencies
